description: Sonatype provides software supply chain and artifact management products including Nexus Repository, IQ/Lifecycle analysis, and Sonatype Guide. These products help organizations manage repositories, analyze open-source components, and automate governance workflows.
summary: Sonatype documents three developer-facing API surfaces: Nexus Repository REST API, IQ Server REST API, Guide REST API, plus a Sonatype MCP Server; public docs found but authentication details/spec URLs were not reliably extractable from the available pages.
